data.name: Snow x Hime
data.detailed_description:
本作追求極致的成人愛愛場面，動作流暢優雅，絢麗繽紛的光影令景色格外閃亮動人，遊戲的核心元素則是充滿了各種愛愛的療癒內容，有口愛, 3P 以及各種愛愛姿勢，未來會陸續追加女主動, 百合等各種愛愛題材。

故事的主角是一名滿滿俠義精神的劍姬，性感成熟 - 刀身纖細，兩者完美融合，將熱血與浪漫結合一起，柔弱的身影在戰場上奔波，力戰無數強敵，令那鮮血如同玫瑰般綻放，小姐姐亦如戰場上的薔薇，美到窒息，尖銳的刺也會令敢於前來採擷之人遍體鱗傷，如櫻花般的散落．

然而不幸的在被敵人俘虜後，小姐姐露出了不曾見過的柔弱嬌貴的一面任敵人擺布，身體也不自覺得跟著敵人舞動了起來．

遊戲中有多款華麗的服飾，這些服裝令小姐姐的魔鬼身材完美體現，黑絲旗袍盡顯小姐姐成熟魅力，溫柔婉約的典雅款式更是不在少數

 
 
 

關於我們：

我們是一個2人開發的獨立團隊，在資金即將燒盡的情況下我們打算用搶先體驗的方式發布

但沒能通過官方審核，於是做了最壞的決定讓遊戲直接上架

在遊戲還有大量未完成時就直接呈現在玩家面前，是我們魯莽錯誤的一步

遊戲一上架時評價非常糟糕，一度感到心灰意冷萬念俱灰

謝謝各位熱心的玩家不斷地給予我們鼓勵與支持

讓我們撐過了最灰暗的時刻，使遊戲的評價有機會慢慢的往上爬升

遊戲目前還有很多不足之處，我們正不斷地使它越變越好，H內容也不斷地升級

這樣一款歷經跌落谷底又緩緩升起的小黃油希望你會喜歡

 
 
 

核心玩法

  • 純粹 BOSS 戰：沒有冗長關卡，直接進入實戰，專注於讀招與節奏掌握。

  • 每位 BOSS 都獨一無二：武器、節奏、出招模式各不相同，沒有任何一場戰鬥會重複。

  • 高強度戰鬥系統：

    • 格擋 / 閃避：生存的基礎。

    • 反擊 / 完美招架：以精準時機逆轉戰局。

    • 硬直 → 連段 → 處決：打破防線、傾瀉火力並終結對手。

  • 成人向敗北選項：敗北後可選擇立刻站起再戰，或進入完整 3D 動畫的露骨性戰鬥（取自 187 段高品質 3D H 動畫）。

角色與解鎖

  • 美麗、迷人的女性 BOSS：每位皆擁有獨特外觀、個性與戰鬥風格。

  • 多套服裝與自訂：擊敗 BOSS 可獲得新服裝，並可自由混搭每個服裝部位，打造你的專屬造型。

  • 記憶碎片：每次勝利可獲得記憶碎片，解鎖更深層的故事，逐步揭開試煉真相。

  • 187 段高品質 3D H 動畫：敗北後的露骨場景皆為全 3D 動畫並含語音，每位 BOSS 都有獨特的互動內容。

你將體驗到

  • 清晰且有成就感的循環：讀招 → 打出硬直 → 處決 → 解鎖服裝與劇情。

  • 每場 BOSS 戰都帶來全新機制、節奏與視覺設計。

  • 敗北後的自由選擇——立即再戰或欣賞187 段優質 3D H 動畫之一。

  • 完整服裝自訂：自由組合已解鎖的任意服裝部件，做出你的獨特風格。

本遊戲包含露骨的性內容（含與 BOSS 的 187 段完整 3D 性場景）以及完整的服裝自訂系統。所有角色皆為 20 歲以上。

 

 

 

⌬女主角擁有多種形象, 有祭司 女狐 女王 蠻子 忍者 武鬥家 將軍⌬

 

 

⌬ 遊戲戰鬥系統為硬核冷兵器戰鬥 ⌬

 

 

⌬擁有豐富的性愛體位 150種H動作 400種姿勢變化⌬

 

 

⌬激情的肉體動態碰撞⌬

data.short_description: 純粹的 BOSS 戰成人動作。與擁有獨特武器與招式的男女 BOSS 戰鬥。勝利可解鎖服裝與故事碎片，服裝可完全自由混搭。失敗可選擇重試，或欣賞露骨的性戰鬥場景，收錄 187 段高品質 3D H 動畫。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 俄文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel core i5
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 3060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel core i5
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 4060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

data.name: Snow x Hime
data.detailed_description:
This title pursues the ultimate in adult erotic expression — movements are smooth and elegant, and the dazzling interplay of light and color makes every scene glow with beauty.
At its core, the game is filled with soothing, passionate intimacy — featuring fellatio, threesomes, and a variety of sexual positions. Future updates will gradually include protagonist-initiated scenes, yuri content, and other erotic themes.

The story follows a sword maiden brimming with chivalry — sensual yet mature, her slender blade and graceful form merge as one, blending passion and romance. Her delicate figure races across the battlefield, fighting countless powerful foes as blood blossoms like roses. She is a rose of war — breathtakingly beautiful, but her sharp thorns wound all who dare to approach, scattering like cherry petals.

Yet misfortune strikes when she’s captured by the enemy, revealing a tender, vulnerable side never seen before. Her body moves involuntarily in rhythm with her captors’ will, surrendering to sensations beyond her control.
The game also features a variety of gorgeous costumes that perfectly accentuate her devilish figure — from black-stockinged qipaos that exude mature allure to elegant and graceful outfits of refined charm.
 
 

 

About us:
We’re a two-person indie team. When our funds were almost running out, we planned to release the game in Early Access.
However, it didn’t pass the official review, and we made the worst decision — to release it directly.
Putting the game out while it was still largely unfinished was a reckless mistake on our part.

At launch, the reviews were terrible, and for a time we felt completely crushed and hopeless.
But thanks to the constant encouragement and support from so many kind players,
we managed to endure the darkest period and slowly see the game’s reputation begin to rise.

The game is still far from perfect, but we’re continuously working to make it better,
and the H-content keeps improving as well.
We hope you’ll enjoy this little adult game that fell to rock bottom and is now slowly climbing back up.

 
 
 

Core Gameplay

  • Pure Boss Battles: Jump straight into the action with no filler stages, focusing entirely on reading attacks and mastering timing.

  • Every Boss Is Unique: Distinct weapons, combat rhythms, and attack patterns—no two fights are the same.

  • High-Intensity Combat System:

    • Block / Dodge: The foundation for survival.

    • Counterattack / Perfect Parry: Reverse the situation with precision timing.

    • Stagger → Combo → Execution: Break their guard, unleash a full assault, and finish them off.

  • Adult Defeat Options: Upon losing, choose between standing back up to fight again or entering a fully animated, explicit sex battle with the victorious boss—drawn from 187 high-quality 3D H animations.

Characters & Unlocks

  • Beautiful, Alluring Female Bosses: Each is designed with a distinct appearance, personality, and fighting style.

  • Multiple Outfits & Customization: Earn new outfits by defeating bosses, then freely mix and match every clothing part for complete customization.

  • Memory Shards: Claim a Memory Shard after each victory to unlock deeper parts of the story and uncover the truth of the trial.

  • 187 High-Quality 3D H Animations: Explicit post-defeat scenes are fully 3D animated and voice-acted, offering a wide variety of sexual interactions unique to each boss.

What You’ll Experience

  • A clear and rewarding gameplay loop: Learn patterns → Break stagger → Execute → Unlock outfits & story.

  • Every boss fight offers new mechanics, pacing, and visual designs.

  • The freedom to choose your post-defeat path—jump straight back into the fight or enjoy one of the game’s 187 premium 3D H animations.

  • Full outfit customization: freely combine any unlocked clothing parts to create your own unique look.

This game contains explicit sexual content, including 187 fully animated 3D sex scenes with the bosses, and a full outfit customization system. All characters are over 20.

 

 

⌬The heroine features multiple personas, including a priestess, fox spirit, queen, barbarian, ninja, martial artist, and general.⌬

 

 

⌬The game’s combat system features hardcore melee combat with cold weapons.⌬

 

 

⌬Featuring a wide variety of sexual positions — 187 H-actions.⌬

 

 

⌬Intense physical collision and erotic interactions.⌬

data.short_description: Pure boss-fight adult action. Battle unique male and female bosses with distinct weapons and moves. Win to unlock outfits and story shards, fully mix-and-match clothing. Lose to retry or enjoy explicit sex battles, featuring 187 high-quality 3D H animations.
data.supported_languages:
English, French, Italian, German, Russian, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Korean
*languages with full audio support
